text.title: Rails Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Rails Service Object + ServiceResult patterns end-to-end.

step.name: define-serviceresult
step.action: Create `app/services/service_result.rb` with the canonical API (`success?`, `failure?`, `value`, `errors`, `self.ok`, `self.fail`). Add CI grep failing on a second `class ServiceResult`.
step.decision-gate: If a second ServiceResult exists, BLOCK per `single-serviceresult` rule.

step.name: write-services
step.action: For each verb create `<Domain>::<Verb>Service` with `initialize(params:, current_user:)` and `call` returning `ServiceResult`. Wrap multi-step writes in `ActiveRecord::Base.transaction`.
step.decision-gate: If service uses positional args or returns a plain hash, BLOCK per `service-signature-params-current-user` rule.

step.name: after-commit-side-effects
step.action: Move side effects to `after_create_commit` / `after_update_commit` callbacks on the model OR chained Sidekiq jobs queued after the service returns. Reject `deliver_later` inside the transaction.
step.output: Side effects fire only on commit

step.name: enable-pundit-verify-authorized
step.action: Add `after_action :verify_authorized, unless: :devise_controller?` and `after_action :verify_policy_scoped` to `ApplicationController`. Audit every controller — call `authorize @resource` or `policy_scope(Resource)` explicitly.
step.decision-gate: If any action lacks `authorize` / `policy_scope`, BLOCK per `pundit-verify-authorized` rule.

step.name: wire-ci-gates
step.action: Add Bullet to test env (Bullet.enable = true + raise = true); add `bundle exec brakeman --no-pager --exit-on-warn` + `bundle exec bundler-audit check --update`. Gate the merge on all three.
